meaning: adj.未定的,(天气等)不稳定的
examples: He seemed undecided whether to go or stay.
I'm still undecided (about) who to vote for.
The venue for the World Cup remains undecided.
With only Florida's 29 electoral votes still undecided, Mr Obama won 303 electoral votes to Mr Romney's 206.
He's increasingly wary of taxing fan loyalty, and is undecided about touring next year.
